titleStmt.title: SII 29.89: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 89. (A.R. No. B. 784 of 1962-63.) HARSŪR, GULBARGA TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Three fragments lying near the Parvatadēva temple.

The record is partially preserved as the left portion of it [from top to bottom] is cut and lost. Even the bottom portion of it is also cut and lost. Hence the record in characters of about the 11th century A.D., is incomplete.

The record belongs to the reign period of Chālukya Vikramāditya VI who is mentioned as permāḍi chakrēśvaram. The record at the beginning, contains the genealogy of the king. The record provides a beautiful description of Goṅkana-nāḍu, a subdivision of Alande-1000.

Also, the record contains a genealogical account of Sāgara-Seṭṭi and Bhāskara-seṭṭi (probably the brothers). They are stated to have constructed two Śiva temples namely Kēdārēśvara and Baḷēśvara respectively and endowed them for the worship and offerings to the gods, (regular) maintenance and repairs of the temples and for feeding the ascetics in the temples. There is a mention of a Goṅka maṁneya about whom the information is incomplete.

The record tells us that besides Śiva the images of gods like Vināyaka, Ravi (Sun), Janārdana and Vāsudēva and goddess Durgā also installed in these temples and the endowment included the worship and offerings to these gods and goddess also.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: [The left portion of the slab from top to bottom is cut and lost].

ra cāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūḷa sthabhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīgaṇapatē namaḥ—
śrīvatsa lakṣmaṁge lakṣmī mādēviya nākalōka vibhuviṁgiṁdra tamaṁ bhakta
gamaṁ koṭṭeniṁ śrī māhēśa surāpagēśa mudadiṁ śrī caṁdra cūḍāmaṇi .
śrayaṁ matta mātana putraṁ vibhuvikramaṁ tadanujaṁ mattayyaṇaṁ mattamātana taṁ
ṁkanātana satsūnuvē sōmanātananujaṁ permmāḍi cakrēśvaraṁ . va . Ātana dēśa meṁtene .
lli vistāradalaṁde sāsirada madhyada goṁkana nāḍādāppa bhūtāraveyiṁta
te dēvabhavanaṁgaḷi(ṁ) śāleya śimaḷāppuguṁ . kaṁda . sallalita vipra saṁkuḷavellaṁ
yarallaṁ patihiteyarellā subhaṭa bhaṭarkkaḷu . mattēvi . vinaya paradoḍa maṇiyeṁ
bikabbegaṁnutatanayarśrī śrēṣṭha gōtra ciṁtāmaṇigaḷ . caṁdaka . jananuta
rvvinayuta nebiseṭṭiyavariṁ kiṟiyaṁ guṇi caṇḍiseṭṭi mattanujanu nākiseṭṭi
ratunatrayaṁ dviguṇamaṁbina puṭṭidariṁtu dhātriyoḷ . va . Aṁtavaroḷagaṇya pu
yoḷiṭarave yiṭṭa chatra vasumatiyoḷu kaṁgiṭṭaḷamappa śivālayaneṭṭaneyi
nama nānta kētiseṭṭiyarakāsthe . vṛtta . varasebhāgyade gaṁgeyaṁ sthirateyiṁ bhū
(bra)rada sītādēviyaṁ pōltu vistaradiṁdaṁ kulakellameyde kuladeyaṁ tāneyeṁdartthi
naṁgāḷvanaṁ . vṛtta . bhūnuta kētiseṭṭi vibhugaṁ satimānini kāḷikabbegaṁ mānita mābi
riṁda nerḷdhaṟeya baṁmaṇaseṭṭiya sāgarayyanuṁ bhānusamānaveṁbinega bhā
roḷu samasta vastuguṇa sāgaraṁ sāgara seṭṭiyuṁ śiṣṭajana kamaḷa bhāskaraṁ
ddimadadiṁ māḍalke celvāgi niṁpudumattaṁtadu bhūmi laṁbadāḷa biḷvaṁtāge saṁ
gada lnētra saṁsēbya mapvudatāṁ bhāskaraseṭṭi māḍidanidaṁ bāḷēśvarā vāsa
rtthiyāgiddava māḍidanaṁtoṁdu śivapratiṣṭheya nadakaṁtālayaṁ kāla
nāṁ nōrppabudvatāṁ sāgaraseṭṭi nirmisida kēdārēśvara vāsamaṁ . vṛtta .
tri yarṇṇandi vināyakaṁ ravi janārdana durggi yu vāsudēva mābṛnda
nanda menalke māḍidaru sāgara bhāskaraseṭṭi dhātriyoḷ . kaṁda .
tiveradaṁbina māḍidaru śivasadanamaṁ nirmmada sāgaraseṭṭi bhāska
rayya māḍisidaṁ tāṁ dhāreyittene dharmmasyatvaritā gatiyeṁba vākyama
jīrṇnōddharaṇa dēvara nivēdya pūjegaṁ tapōdhanaraṁna dānakkaṁ .
jādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya ku
yarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkka
diṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttumire tatpāda padmōpajīvi .
vanaja nādāḍigaḷuṁba goṁka maṁneya (mai)da .
śvaraṁ padmāvatīdēvi labdhavaraprasādaṁ mṛgamadā
kyaṁ maṁneya māṇikyaṁ parōpakāra jīmūta
Digital edition of SII 29.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
